name: metaphor
description: A must communicate that a new object is LIKE a known one but differs in one property.
task_a: You can see world-state.json. There is a REFERENCE object (circle, red, at position 0,0) and a NEW object. The new object is LIKE the reference but it is BLUE instead of red, and at position 1,1 instead of 0,0. Communicate to Agent B: 'new object is like reference but different color and position'. B should write ANSWER.md describing the new object.
task_b: Agent A will describe a NEW object by comparing it to a known REFERENCE object. The reference is: circle, red, at (0,0). Agent A will tell you how the new object DIFFERS from the reference. Write ANSWER.md with the full description of the new object.
